user.title: Set up openSenseMap Advanced
user.description: Enter the ID of your openSenseMap station (senseBox). You can find this in the URL of your station on opensensemap.org.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to openSenseMap. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_station: Station ID not found on openSenseMap. Please verify the ID.

abort.already_configured: This openSenseMap station is already configured.

init.title: Configure openSenseMap Advanced Options
init.description: Configure pull and push settings. Map Home Assistant entity states to openSenseMap sensor IDs in JSON format (e.g., `{"sensor.my_temp": "opensensemap_sensor_id"}`).

data.retain_state: Retain last known states on network timeout
data.push_mappings_json: Entity Mappings JSON (dict of ha_entity_id: sensebox_sensor_id)

error.api_key_required: API Key is required to enable Push Mode.
error.invalid_mappings: Invalid Entity Mappings JSON format. Ensure it is a valid JSON dictionary mapping string entity IDs to string sensor IDs.
